ul.li: Type: Message type discriminator (0x10 for GOSSIP)
NodeIDLen: Length prefix for sender's node ID (uint8)
NodeID: UTF-8 encoded node identifier (variable, max 255 bytes)
EntryCount: Number of EntryDigest entries (uint32, big-endian)
TTL: Remaining hop count, decremented on forward (uint8)
OriginID: Original message creator's node ID (length-prefixed)
OriginClock: Origin's Lamport clock for deduplication (uint64, big-endian)
